title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, June 07 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 07/06/2022
Image reference: 2022-06-07_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-june-07-2022_img1.png
Tankers: Mid-age Aframax Tanker values have firmed
VLCC Duqm (310,100 DWT, Nov 2008, Imabari) sold to Unknown Asian for USD 38.40 mil, VV Value USD 40.67 mil - BWTS Fitted. Suezmax Marvin Star (158,000 DWT, Nov 2009, Hyundai Samho Heavy Ind) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 26.40 mil, VV Value USD 30.02 mil - At Auction/DD Due. Bulkers: Panamax Bulker values have firmed
Supramax Van Fortune (56,800 DWT, Aug 2009, Taizhou Sanfu Shipbuilding) sold to HNA Technology Investments Holdings for USD 16.50 mil, VV Value USD 15.97 mil.
